subcodes.first_line: Thy book hath attained unto supreme triumph by appearing at this Scene, whilst We were encompassed by tribulations none can reckon save [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فاز کتابک بفوز الاکبر بما حضر فی هذا المنظر اذ کنا فی بلایا لایحصیها الا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @predictions and prophecies
